scores.metric: full-build unmasked Levenshtein vs pristine code6cac_c2.o (clean pin-free + named-const body)

sessions.lever: 5 more structural variants (ot-before-code, split-tag1/2, u32*-p, ot-init-at-decl, all-inline); RTL lreg/greg dumps confirming scheduler root cause
sessions.note: All variant scores confirmed 13; RTL confirms pseudo-72 (tag) forced to global alloc (dies in 2 places), GCC scheduler always hoists lw-tag before sw-code to hide load latency — code/tag interference is structural

reviewer.evidence: candidate.c is clean pure C (named-const addPrim form; zero rules, zero asm — also removes HEAD's bogus `ori %0,%0,0xFFFF :: r(base)` coercion). Not committable only because of a register-allocation tie (non-matching), not a cheat.

remaining_gap.summary: Register-allocation tie driven by a scheduler quality difference. GCC 2.7.2 hoists lw-tag (0(p)) BEFORE sw-code (4(p)) to hide the 1-cycle MIPS load delay. This makes code and tag live ranges overlap → tag conflicts with all regs 2-7 → global allocator forces it to $t0. Target's original cc1psx did NOT hoist (scheduled ot-load sequence between sw-code and lw-tag instead), so code died before tag was born — no interference, tag gets $a0. 11 structural variants tried; all produce the same allocation.
remaining_gap.rules_required_for_full_match: HEAD uses 4 register-asm pins (code a1, mask_lo a2, mask_hi a3, p v1) + a phantom ori-asm. Pure-C cannot create a non-aliasing data dependency between sw-code and lw-tag that the -O2 scheduler would honor.

next_hypotheses: decomp-permuter from the pin-free base if it becomes available (27 insns, few relocations -> isolated score more faithful; known-best hope per prior session).
canonical-asm review: a1/a2/a3 arg-register layout in a no-arg fn is a hand-asm hallmark (S1 signal). If permuter unavailable, escalate to Adjudicator.

anonymous constant still materializes in $a0; same allocation
scheduler still hoists lw-tag before sw-code
split live ranges still conflict with code's $a0
scheduler still hoists lw-tag before sw-code; tag still $t0

rejected_forms.form: all-inline (no named masks, inline all constants)
